programme.title: Forbidden Science - Clone Fantasy
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep101: Bull Sharks & Great Hammerhead Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV takes a Bull Shark diving trip off the Florida Coast, dives with Hammerhead Sharks in the Bahamas and takes a Deeper Dive studying Great Hammerhead Sharks.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail circle back with the A-Team to map out growth strategies for Law Enforcement Specialists, whose new app has the potential to scale nationwide through smart media outreach. Kyle Reyes takes a personal interest in guiding the process, while the team also welcomes powerhouse attorney Stephen Geday, bringing sharp legal expertise to the roster. David Beavis Photography explores fresh marketing moves and B2B opportunities with designers, laying the groundwork for a gallery launch in Naples, Florida. Provision Brokerage looks to streamline its legacy with a clear plan forward, while new A-Team member Riggs Eckelberry—pioneering disruptor in the water industry—joins the mission. Finally, the team evaluates how Connected & Protected can expand their safety tech beyond seniors and first responders, reaching hospitals and even children.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode kicks off inside the headquarters of Law Enforcement Specialists, where their mission is clear: Prevent. Protect. Respond. From their signed officer wall to their welcoming space for first responders, Bonnie and her team are on the front lines for those who serve. We also get an inside look at their groundbreaking Blue Dispatch software, helping departments streamline jobs and response times. Next, the A-Team travels to Naples, Florida, to celebrate the grand opening of David Beavis’ newest gallery, where his breathtaking photography delivers a powerful message of God’s love and the beauty of creation. Then, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage shows how his company protects seniors’ “safe money” and builds retirement security for the long haul. Finally, we visit the Connected & Protected call center with president Adam Marsh, where their team makes it simple for seniors to stay safe with innovative, easy-to-use technology.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Take flight with The Big Reveal as Don Mann (Surviving Mann), Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann), and Laura Zaspel (Farm Hero) visit Air Tractor—America’s iconic maker of crop dusters, firefighting, and military aircraft. Witness the power, precision, and pride behind the company proving that American craftsmanship still soars.

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: Ziplining in Colorado’s Gorges, free falls and donuts. The Real Man show is back in full swing in Colorado. Kyle is joined by special guests and American Patriots as he explores what thrills and adventures this amazing country has to offer. And he’s just getting started.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day begins with a powerful dose of perspective as contestants hear real-life breaching stories from American heroes—reminders of the stakes they’re preparing for. The team is then introduced to a concealed firearm headrest safe designed for rapid-response vehicle defense. Next, it’s straight into the action with a preliminary course of fire using GreenLight sights, where top performers are pushed even further with a bonus round to test speed, accuracy, and composure under pressure. The intensity ramps up during a sentry scenario featuring SABRE CO₂ non-lethal cartridges, putting their stealth and judgment to the test. But just as the dust begins to settle, a new CIA briefing drops—and it’s the most dire yet. With mission reality closing in fast, the contestants close the day with a crash course in S.E.R.E. (Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape) training, rounding out their classroom combat readiness with hard-earned grit.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Two players remain, but only one can claim the title of WPT Choctaw Champion. Both Chance Kornuth and Steve “Cuz” Buckner begin this heads up match with nearly even stacks in what promises to be an epic battle. The winner will receive $486,600 and their name forever engraved on the coveted Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup. Tune in to the crowning of a WPT Champion in this epic conclusion of the WPT Choctaw Main Event.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Final Table of the first ever WPT Ladies Championship at Wynn Las Vegas is set. Kathy Liebert, Jamie Kerstetter, Olga Iermolcheva, Lina Niu, Cindy Spier, and Dusti Smith round out our final six. Find out who has what it takes to become the first WPT Ladies Champion and take home the first place prize of $105,136.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Six talented poker competitors remain in the first ever WPT Ladies Championship. Lina Niu has the chip lead, but Olga Iermolcheva is right on her heels. Tension is rising as the short stacks are being forced to make their move to stay alive. It’s anyone’s game as final table action gets back underway at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: One of poker’s top female earners of all time, Kathy Leibert finds herself as the shortest stack at the table with only four women remaining. Watch Kathy reach into her bag of tricks as she attempts to battle back in hopes of becoming the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Only three ladies remain in the battle for over $100,000 and the title of WPT Ladies Champion. Olga Iermolcheva has a commanding chip lead, but her competitors are showing no signs of backing down. Prepare for plenty of thrilling poker action under the lights at Wynn Las Vegas as we play down to the crowning of the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 5 - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: MJ Gonzales reads through the soul of a 3-barrel bluff. What else would you expect from Daniel Negreanu's poker coach? Episode 5 features special guest Cody Daniels making his poker night debut. Full Line up: Cody Daniels, MJ Gonzales, Johnnie Vibes, DJ Washburn, Adam Hendrix, Nicky Ringz & Danny Panagatos.

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 6 - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: More $25/$50+ high stakes action from Studio 52 in Las Vegas. Lineup features MJ Gonzales, Adam Hendrix, Christian Soto, Jared Jaffee, Danny Panagatos & Mitchell Bank.

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 7 - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Tensions rise on the felt as the poker action heats up in this wild $25/$50/$100 high stakes cash game from Studio 52 in Las Vegas. Lineup features Krissy Foxen, Christian Soto, Jared Jaffee, MJ Gonzales, Hayley Hanna & Christina McAlpin.

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 8 - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: The established PROS received BAD intel on Keir Sullivan, not realizing they invited a SHARK to their game. Wild high stakes action $100/$200. Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 9 - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: If anyone can stop Keir Sullivan's winning streak, it's Shaun Deeb...right? Wild high stakes action $100/$200. Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy heads to the Rockies where he becomes involved in a dispute between ranchers and troublemakers threatening the peace of the region. With courage, quick thinking, and a few songs along the way, he works to restore order and protect those in danger.

programme.title: Roll Along, Cowboy (1937
programme.desc: A drifting cowboy becomes involved in a conflict between ranchers and outlaws, working to protect the innocent and uncover a scheme of deception and violence while bringing the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Abilene Town (1946) Colorized : Randolph Scott
programme.desc: Randolph Scott stars in Abilene Town, a frontier drama of change, conflict, and courage. As homesteaders and cattlemen clash over land rights, Marshal Dan Mitchell (Scott) struggles to keep the peace in a town on the brink of chaos. Torn between lawless violence, shifting loyalties, and two women pulling at his heart, the marshal must decide where he stands as Abilene’s future hangs in the balance. With vivid characters, tense standoffs, and classic Western grit, this film captures the spirit of a town caught between the old West and the new.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.
